summary: Batch decomp PR matching six functions and improving several partial matches across camera, fighter, game-mode, stage, interface, menu, and trophy/toy code. Evidence includes the PR body, changed-file list, diff excerpt, and GALE01 bot report confirming six new 100% matches plus twelve unmatched-item improvements.

key_files.role: Matched Camera_80030E44 by changing access shape from a local Camera* alias to direct cm_80452C68 field accesses.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists Camera_80030E44 93.01% to 100.00%

key_files.role: Matched ftAction_80073008 by adjusting local types/order, removing PAD_STACK, using float temporaries, and casting color_anim at the call.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists ftAction_80073008 68.59% to 100.00%

key_files.role: Matched fn_8017A9B4 by factoring repeated HSD_ImageDesc setup into a static inline helper and passing dimension-table pointers.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists fn_8017A9B4 57.18% to 100.00%

key_files.role: Matched ftNn_Init_80123954 and improved .sdata2 score by revising local declarations, removing PAD_STACK, changing branch/call shapes, and adding explicit float-square temporaries and cast.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists ftNn_Init_80123954 74.64% to 100.00% and .sdata2 71.62% to 83.33%

key_files.role: Matched gm_801A9DD0 by changing the third parameter to u16, initializing Vec3 locals from static consts, using named float locals for camera parameters, and using Scissor storage cast for viewport call.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists gm_801A9DD0 62.30% to 100.00%

key_files.role: Updated gm_801A9DD0 prototype to match the recovered body signature.
Contributed to new match un_80318B1C and .sdata2 improvement, but the loaded diff excerpt does not include the file hunk.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists un_80318B1C 78.14% to 100.00% and .sdata2 80.50% to 82.67%

key_files.role: Improved gmCamera_801A292C by replacing manual snapshot loop with gmCamera_801A25C8, using a local struct pointer/table pointer, and replacing an if-based clamp with MIN.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists gmCamera_801A292C 73.24% to 93.02%

key_files.role: Improved fn_80175A94 by changing selected result-display field accesses, changing switch to if/else chain, and introducing temporaries affecting stack/register shape.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists fn_80175A94 8.25% to 99.66%

key_files.role: Improved grInishie2_801FD9EC by adjusting GET_GROUND usage, local declaration order, and Vec3 pointer reuse around JObj translation calls.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists grInishie2_801FD9EC 95.16% to 98.13%

key_files.role: Improved ft_800852B0 by changing traversal from multiple incremented pointers to indexed CostumeListsForeachCharacter access plus derived table pointers.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists ft_800852B0 90.98% to 97.36%

key_files.role: Improved ftKb_SpecialN_800EED50 with a u8 cast for efAsync_LoadSync argument.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists ftKb_SpecialN_800EED50 77.19% to 78.40%

key_files.role: Improved un_80303FD4; loaded changed-file metadata and bot report identify the improvement, but no hunk is available in the excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists un_80303FD4 50.37% to 93.04%

key_files.role: Improved fn_802FA6C4; loaded changed-file metadata and bot report identify the improvement, but no hunk is available in the excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists fn_802FA6C4 72.48% to 99.13%

key_files.role: Improved un_802FF570; loaded changed-file metadata and bot report identify the improvement, but no hunk is available in the excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists un_802FF570 70.41% to 88.18%

key_files.role: Improved mn_8022FB88; loaded changed-file metadata and bot report identify the improvement, but no hunk is available in the excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists mn_8022FB88 99.50% to 99.80%

key_files.role: Improved un_803147C4; loaded changed-file metadata and bot report identify the improvement, but no hunk is available in the excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists un_803147C4 85.97% to 99.38%

key_files.role: Header change associated with toy/ty improvements; exact semantic change is not shown in loaded diff excerpt.

what_changed: Six functions were reported as newly matched at 100.00%: Camera_80030E44, ftAction_80073008, fn_8017A9B4, un_80318B1C, ftNn_Init_80123954, and gm_801A9DD0.
Twelve unmatched items were reported as improved, including fn_80175A94 to 99.66%, fn_802FA6C4 to 99.13%, un_803147C4 to 99.38%, grInishie2_801FD9EC to 98.13%, and ft_800852B0 to 97.36%.
gm_801A9DD0 signature changed in both source and header from an int third parameter to u16, with PR verification explicitly including require-protos.
Several hunks adjusted local variable declaration order, local lifetimes, casts, direct global access, helper calls, and macro/control-flow shape to improve or complete matches.
No review comments are present in the loaded slice; the only post-PR feedback evidence is the decomp-dev bot GALE01 report.

smart_moves.text: The PR paired a recovered body signature change with an owning header prototype update for gm_801A9DD0, and the PR body lists require-protos verification.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmopening.c and gmopening.h gm_801A9DD0 hunks

smart_moves.text: For fn_8017A9B4, the repeated two-image initialization sequence was expressed with a static inline helper, reducing duplicate source while still reaching a 100% match according to the bot report.
For gmCamera_801A292C, a manual min branch was replaced with MIN(unk->x30, unk->x40), aligning with ordinary macro-shaped source and improving the function score.
PAD_STACK was removed from ftAction_80073008 and ftNn_Init_80123954 while the bot report confirms both functions became 100% matches.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered function body proves a parameter type, update the owning header in the same PR and run require-protos.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_801A9DD0 changed arg2 from int to u16 in gmopening.c
raw_diff: gmopening.h prototype changed to u16

decomp_lessons.lesson: Removing PAD_STACK can be viable when local declarations, types, expression order, and casts are recovered enough to reproduce the desired stack/register shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftAction_80073008 removes PAD_STACK(20) and matches 100%
raw_diff: ftNn_Init_80123954 removes PAD_STACK(24) and matches 100%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Repeated adjacent initialization blocks may match as a small static inline helper when the helper captures the shared source-level operation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmresultplayer.c adds inline1 and uses it twice
text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists fn_8017A9B4 as 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: Macro-shaped expressions such as MIN can replace explicit branch/select code when the operation is a normal min clamp and the score improves.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmCamera_801A292C replaces x44 branch with unk->x44 = MIN(unk->x30, unk->x40)
text_corpus: GALE01 bot report lists gmCamera_801A292C improvement

naming_conventions.convention: Semantic local names were used where roles were clear from existing types or fields, such as nana_fp, popo_fp, attrs, disp, match_end, unk, texts, tbl, gp, jobj, and temp_vec.
Address-style function names were retained for still-unnamed symbols such as fn_8017A9B4, gm_801A9DD0, fn_80175A94, un_80303FD4, and un_803147C4 rather than inventing semantics.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Matches and Additional improvements lists
text_corpus: GALE01 bot report item names

naming_conventions.convention: Some temporary placeholder names remained in matching-oriented hunks, such as new_var, new_var2, new_var3, new_var4, and inline1; the slice supports that these were match-related edits but does not prove they are preferred final names.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Direct global field access instead of a local pointer alias can affect matching; Camera_80030E44 changed from Camera* camera = &cm_80452C68 to repeated cm_80452C68 field accesses and reached 100%.
Use explicit casts at call sites or comparisons where needed for codegen, shown by (u8) ftKb_Init_803CB46C[arg0], (s32) color_anim, and a cast in the Nana distance comparison.
Split arithmetic into named float temporaries to influence evaluation order and register allocation, as seen in ftAction_80073008, ftNn_Init_80123954, gm_801A9DD0, and fn_80175A94.
Replace duplicated source blocks with a static inline helper when identical setup appears twice and the helper form matches.
Use local pointers to table/global substructures to control access shape, shown by gmCamera_80479BC8.gcus through unk, gmCamera_803DA630 through tbl, and ResultsData through new_var.

review_feedback.feedback: GALE01 report recorded +0.06% matched code and +2216 bytes, with six new matches and twelve unmatched-item improvements.
No human review comments or review records are present in the loaded evidence.

follow_up_queries: PR 2575 ftAction_80073008 PAD_STACK removed color_anim cast
PR 2575 fn_8017A9B4 static inline HSD_ImageDesc lb_800121FC
PR 2575 ftNn_Init_80123954 Nana Popo distance cast

evidence_refs: human_pr_text: PR body with matches, improvements, and verification
text_corpus: PR body and decomp-dev bot GALE01 report
notes: Evidence is strong for PR identity, changed files, six claimed matches, bot-reported score changes, and hunks visible in the diff excerpt.

The raw diff is marked truncated; hunks for several changed files are not loaded, so file-specific tactics for ifcoget.c, ifstock.c, textlib.c, mnmainrule.c, tydisplay.c, tylist.c, and toy.h are limited to changed-file metadata and bot/PR-body claims.
No human review comments are present, so no reviewer intent or requested changes are inferred.
Verification commands and GALE01 results are from PR body and bot report; no independent build or objdiff was run during intake.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Header prototypes should be updated when a matched body proves the signature
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2575 changed gm_801A9DD0's third parameter from int to u16 in both gmopening.c and gmopening.h, and the PR body lists python configure.py --require-protos as verification.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Static inline helper for repeated setup
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2575 matched fn_8017A9B4 by replacing two repeated HSD_ImageDesc initialization blocks with a static inline helper that clears image_ptr and calls lb_800121FC.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PAD_STACK removal after recovering local expression shape
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2575 removed PAD_STACK from ftAction_80073008 and ftNn_Init_80123954 while the GALE01 report shows both became 100% matches; the visible hunks also changed local declaration order, types, temporaries, casts, and call argument order.

source_update_candidates.title: Consider documenting static inline helpers as a valid repeated-block matching tactic
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2575 provides a concrete example where factoring two repeated HSD_ImageDesc setup blocks into a static inline helper produced a 100% match for fn_8017A9B4. This may complement existing standards on natural loops and authored source style, but curator should compare with broader project practice before promoting it.
source_update_candidates.reason: The case is well supported by PR evidence, but a single PR should not become a global standard without curation against local source patterns.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that direct global field access is globally preferred over local pointer aliases; PR #2575 only shows it helped Camera_80030E44.
Do not promote placeholder names such as new_var or inline1 as naming conventions; they appear in match-oriented hunks but are not evidence of desired final style.
Do not infer detailed tactics for files whose hunks are absent from the truncated diff excerpt; only their changed-file presence and bot-reported score changes are supported.
